message:
✨ Name-based EPG auto-matching, O(n) failover index (#83)

- Add 3-tier EPG ID resolution: explicit mapping → tvgId → name match
- Add _normalizeForEpgMatch() to strip country/quality tags for fuzzy matching
- Build _epgNameToId map from EPG channel displayNames for name fallback
- Replace O(n²) failover alt scan with pre-built normNameIndex HashMap
- Remove debug prints from _loadChannels

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
